purpose: Phase 4 oracle: dim-4 gluing isogeny internals (domain, 5-point kernel + directions, codomain with zero dual null) and special_image triples.
note: L_K_8_ind directions are [1,2,4,8,3]; the 5th (3 = bits 0+1) is the diagonal edge that lets the spanning tree cover all 16 indices despite zero-denominator single-bit edges. ref_base_change_triggers counts ThetaStructureDim4 doubling base-change fallbacks (the 'change of theta coordinates' path).
